fields.name: Sales Quotes - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales quotes that are not yet converted to invoices or orders.

fields.name: Sales Orders - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales orders that are not fully posted.

fields.name: Ready to Ship
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of ready to ship documents that are displayed in the Sales Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Delayed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of delayed documents that are displayed in the Sales Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Sales Return Orders - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales return orders documents that are displayed in the Sales Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Sales Credit Memos - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales credit memos that are not yet posted.

fields.name: Partially Shipped
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number partially shipped documents that are displayed in the Sales Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Sales Inv. - Pending Doc.Exch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales invoices that await sending to the customer through the document exchange service.

fields.name: Sales CrM. - Pending Doc.Exch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales credit memos that await sending to the customer through the document exchange service.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Date Filter2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the second filter date for the documents that are displayed in the Sales Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: Responsibility Center Filter
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.
